headline: Information Security Intern | Cloud & Identity Security

skills.splunk: Designed and deployed SPL-based detection dashboards monitoring login trends, IP anomalies, and event volume across enterprise systems, improving threat visibility and accelerating incident triage.
skills.azure_ad: Managed identity and access controls for 200+ employees via Azure Active Directory, enforcing RBAC policies and least-privilege principles. Contributed to Microsoft Intune security policy deployment for endpoint compliance and device management.
skills.windows_laps: Developed and enforced Windows LAPS policies across Active Directory and hybrid environments, automating local admin password rotation and reducing credential exposure risk across 500+ endpoints.

education.school: The University of Texas at Dallas
education.degree: B.S. in Computer Information Systems & Technology
education.details: In progress: Johns Hopkins University Professional Certificate in Cybersecurity — IT and Data Security in the Age of AI; UT Dallas Global Career Accelerator Professional Certificate Program

certifications: Johns Hopkins Cybersecurity Professional Certificate (in progress)
UT Dallas Global Career Accelerator Certificate (in progress)

projects.title: Private AI Infrastructure Feasibility Study — DFW Technology
projects.summary: Led a 5-person UT Dallas senior capstone consulting team advising DFW Technology, in partnership with the City of Richardson, on the feasibility of private AI data warehouses. Selected as a Top 15 capstone project out of 6,000+ students at the UTDsolv Capstone Expo.

projects.title: SPL Detection Dashboards — UT System Internship
projects.summary: Designed and deployed Splunk dashboards monitoring login trends, IP anomalies, and event volume across enterprise systems, improving threat visibility and accelerating incident triage.

bullets: Designed and deployed SPL-based detection dashboards across enterprise systems, improving threat visibility and accelerating incident triage.
Developed and enforced Windows LAPS policies across Active Directory and hybrid environments, reducing credential exposure risk across 500+ endpoints.
Monitored Azure and Citrix environments, resolving 200+ technical incidents while maintaining system performance and availability for enterprise clients.
